expectations.text: Uses pymapdl exec with -c flags for APDL commands
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states 'The pymapdl CLI cannot execute APDL modeling commands directly'. Falls back to batch MAPDL (ansys251 -b -i) or Python one-liners.
Included in the .inp file and Python one-liner, but NOT via pymapdl exec.
SOLVE is present in both options, but not via pymapdl exec.

expectations.text: Commands are in correct order: start before exec before stop
expectations.evidence: Does not use pymapdl exec at all. Uses native MAPDL batch or Python instead.
